query: SELECT id, hostName, bio, cuisineStyle FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved' AND id != 150001;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, bio, cuisineStyle FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved' AND id != 150001;

rows.bio: Hi! We are avid travelers who have been to more than 60 countries, and just set our foot on all seven continents on earth! (Antarctica is a great honeymoon location :). We love hosting friends and have some nice chats over Chinese dinner. Cultural exchange is what I have been doing in life - I have lived in four continents (Shanghai, Copenhagen, Nairobi and Chicago). Come and enjoy a nice meal and good conversations!

Hi, I’m Grace. Born in Guizhou and shaped by more than a decade living abroad—mostly in the U.S.—I found my way back to Chinese cooking through a familiar homesickness: missing the flavors of home. Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I’m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world. Come share a thoughtfully prepared meal, good conversation, and a genuine cultural exchange—one table, many stories.

Chuan's culinary journey began in childhood when she couldn't find delicious, lightly-oiled stir-fried eggplant in restaurants, so she decided to cook herself. Her passion for home cooking was ignited from that moment. Her philosophy of "eating well" means nutritious, balanced meals with clean flavors and authentic taste. Her dishes blend ingredients and flavors from Guangxi, Guangdong, and Southeast Asia.

messages: 90002	Grace Tong	Hi, I’m Grace. Born in Guizhou and shaped by more than a decade living abroad—mostly in the U.S.—I found my way back to Chinese cooking through a familiar homesickness: missing the flavors of home.

Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I’m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world. Come share a thoughtfully prepared meal, good conversation, and a genuine cultural exchange—one table, many stories.	Chinese and Western Fusion
210001	Echo Ren	Hi! I’m a Shanghai local and I love home cooking.
I cook for my family every day and often host relatives during holidays. My cooking is typical Chinese home-style food-simple, comforting and meant to be shared.
This would be my first time hosting international guests, but I’d love to open my home and share a real family- style Chinese meal and everyday stories about life in Shanghai.	Shanghai home cooking
